member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Extensions.ColorExtensions.ToMaui(Mapsui.Styles.Color)
member.summary: Convert Mapsui.Styles.Color to Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Extensions.ColorExtensions.ToMapsui(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color)
member.summary: Convert Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color to Mapsui.Style.Color

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Extensions.TextAlignmentExtensions.ToMapsui(Microsoft.Maui.TextAlignment)
member.summary: Convert Microsoft.Maui.TextAlignment to Mapsui/RichTextKit.Styles.Color

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Extensions.PositionExtensions.ToMaui(Mapsui.MPoint)
member.summary: Convert Mapsui.Geometries.Point to Mapsui.UI.Maui.Position

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Extensions.ZoomLevelExtensions.ToMapsuiResolution(System.Double)
member.summary: Convert zoom level (as described at https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Zoom_levels) into a Mapsui resolution

member.name: T:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl
member.summary: UI component that displays an interactive map

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.IsStaleTimeSpan
member.summary: If finger position is not updated during the IsStaleTimeSpan period, the touch event is considered stale and is removed. Touch input is not always reliable. This could be because of bugs in SkiaSharp, WinUI, iOS or Android, MAUI, in hardware drivers, or hardware. To work around this we remove the touch events if they did not change after some period. Making this period too short could remove valid events, making it too long would result in a longer period of dangling ghost touches. You might want to tweak this value to your needs.

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.OpenInBrowser(System.String)
member.summary: Public functions

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.ClearTouchState
member.summary: Clears the Touch State

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.MaxTapGestureMovement
member.summary: The movement allowed between a touch down and touch up in a touch gestures in device independent pixels.

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.UseFling
member.summary: Use fling gesture to move the map. Default is true. Fling means that the map will continue to move for a short time after the user has lifted the finger.

member.name: E:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.Info
member.summary: Called whenever the map is clicked. The MapInfoEventArgs contain the features that were hit in the layers that have IsMapInfoLayer set to true.
member.remarks: The Map.Tapped event is preferred over the Info event. This event is kept for backwards compatibility.

member.name: E:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.MapTapped
member.summary: Event that is triggered when the map is tapped. Can be a single tap, double tap or long press.

member.name: E:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.MapPointerPressed
member.summary: Event that is triggered when on pointer down.

member.name: E:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.MapPointerMoved
member.summary: Event that is triggered when on pointer move. Can be a drag or hover.

member.name: E:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.MapPointerReleased
member.summary: Event that is triggered when on pointer up.

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.ForceUpdate
member.summary: Force a update of control
member.remarks: When this function is called, the control draws itself once

member.name: E:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.PropertyChanged
member.summary: Called whenever a property is changed

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.Unsubscribe
member.summary: Unsubscribe from map events

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.SubscribeToMapEvents(Mapsui.Map)
member.summary: Subscribe to map events
member.param: Map, to which events to subscribe

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.UnsubscribeFromMapEvents(Mapsui.Map)
member.summary: Unsubscribe from map events
member.param: Map, to which events to unsubscribe

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.RefreshData(Mapsui.ChangeType)
member.summary: Refresh data of Map, but don't paint it

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapControl.TryUpdateViewportSize
member.summary: Tries to set the size of the MapControl.Map.Viewport.

member.name: T:Mapsui.UI.Maui.KnownColor
member.summary: Known Color Helper for Maui

member.summary: Type of pin. There are some predefined pins.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the from latitude and longitude

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the from position

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Position.Latitude
member.summary: Latitude of position

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Position.Longitude
member.summary: Longitude of position

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Position.ToMapsui
member.summary: Convert Xamarin.Forms.Maps.Position to Mapsui.Geometries.Point

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Position.ToString
member.summary: Returns a that represents the current

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Position.ToString(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a that represents the current in a given format

remarks.para: Format string has 6 parts. This are separated by a "|" character. The first part is the format for the latitude, the second the format for the longitude part. Than follow shortcuts for the orientations: north, south, east, west.

The parameters for the format for latitude and longitude are - P: Cardinal direction like north or east - D: Degrees as integer number. If there are more D than numbers, than there are trailing zeros. E.g. "DDD" and 13 is replaced as "013" - d: Decimal degrees as numbers. Each d is replaced with a number, e.g. "ddd" and 13.5467 degrees gives "546" - M: Minutes as integer number. If there are more M than numbers, than there are trailing zeros. E.g. "MM" and 5 is replaced as "05" - m: Decimal minutes as numbers. Each m is replaced with a number, e.g. "mmm" and 13.5467 minutes gives "546" - S: Seconds as integer number. If there are more S than numbers, than there are trailing zeros. E.g. "SS" and 5 is replaced as "05" - s: Decimal seconds as numbers. Each s is replaced with a number, e.g. "sss" and 13.5467 minutes gives "546"

Examples All following examples are for the position 38.959390°, -95.265483°. - The format string "P DD° MM.mmm'|P DDD° MM.mmm'|N|S|E|W" gives "N 38° 57.563' W 095° 15.928'". - The format string "PDD° MM.mmm'|PDDD° MM.mmm'||-||-" gives "38° 57.563' -095° 15.928'". - The format string "DD° MM' SS.sss" P|DDD° MM' SS.sss" P|North|South|East|West" gives "38° 57' 33.804" North 095° 15' 55.739" West".

member.name: F:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Position.DecimalDegrees
member.summary: Format for coordinates with decimal degrees

member.name: F:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Position.DecimalMinutes
member.summary: Format for coordinates with decimal minutes

member.name: F:Mapsui.UI.Maui.Position.DecimalSeconds
member.summary: Format for coordinates with decimal seconds

member.summary: Polyline helper class

member.summary: Decode

member.name: T:Mapsui.UI.Objects.Drawable
member.summary: Base class for all drawables like polyline, polygon and circle

member.summary: Label of drawable

member.summary: StrokeWidth of drawable in pixel

member.summary: StrokeColor for drawable

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Objects.Drawable.MinVisible
member.summary: MinVisible for drawable in resolution of Mapsui (smaller values are higher zoom levels)

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Objects.Drawable.MaxVisible
member.summary: MaxVisible for drawable in resolution of Mapsui (smaller values are higher zoom levels)

member.summary: ZIndex of this drawable

member.summary: Is this drawable clickable

member.summary: Mapsui Feature belonging to this drawable

member.summary: Event called, if this drawable is clicked an IsClickable is true

member.name: T:Mapsui.UI.Objects.IClickable
member.summary: Interface for objects that are clickable

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Objects.IClickable.IsClickable
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this is clickable.
member.value: true if is clickable; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Handle click event

member.summary: Get information, when this object is clicked

member.name: T:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer
member.summary: A layer to display a symbol for own location
member.remarks: There are two different symbols for own location: one is used when there isn't a change in position (still), and one is used, if the position changes (moving).

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.IsMoving
member.summary: Should be moving arrow or round circle displayed

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.MyLocation
member.summary: Position of location, that is displayed

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.Direction
member.summary: Movement direction of device at location

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.ViewingDirection
member.summary: Viewing direction of device (in degrees wrt. north direction)

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.Scale
member.summary: Scale of symbol

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.CalloutText
member.summary: The text that is displayed in the MyLocation callout (can contain line breaks).

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.ShowCallout
member.summary: Show or hide a callout with further infos next to the MyLocation symbol.

member.name: P:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.MapView
member.summary: Sets Map View

member.name: E:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.Clicked
member.summary: This event is triggered whenever the MyLocation symbol or label is clicked.

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.#ctor(Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapView,Mapsui.UI.Maui.Position)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a starting location.
member.param: MapView, to which this layer belongs

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.#ctor(Mapsui.UI.Maui.MapView)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: MapView, to which this layer belongs

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.UpdateMyLocation(Mapsui.UI.Maui.Position,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates my location
member.param: true if there is an animation from the old to the new location.

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.UpdateMyDirection(System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Updates my movement direction

member.name: M:Mapsui.UI.Objects.MyLocationLayer.UpdateMySpeed(System.Double)
member.summary: Updates my speed

member.summary: Updates my view direction

member.name: M:Mapsui.Rendering.RenderController.SetupDrawableFactory(Mapsui.Rendering.RenderService)
member.summary: Sets up the drawable factory on the RenderService. This wires the renderer's method to the delegate, enabling the fetch pipeline to create drawables without direct access to the renderer.

member.name: M:Mapsui.Rendering.RenderController.UpdateDrawables(Mapsui.Viewport,Mapsui.Layers.ILayer,Mapsui.Rendering.RenderService)
member.summary: Delegates to the map renderer's UpdateDrawables to create pre-rendered objects. Called when layer data changes.

member.name: M:Mapsui.Rendering.RenderController.RefreshGraphics
member.summary: Signals that the entire viewport needs to be redrawn on the next render cycle.

member.name: M:Mapsui.Rendering.RenderController.RefreshGraphics(Mapsui.MRect)
member.summary: Signals that only the given world-coordinate rectangle needs to be redrawn. Multiple calls before the next render are unioned into one accumulated dirty rect. If a full refresh is already pending, the dirty rect is ignored.
member.param: The world-coordinate region that changed, or to force a full refresh.
